ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., fossil fuel, renewable) */,
  "emission_level" TEXT /* Emission level of the energy source (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_retirements" (
  "retirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the retirement */,
  "retirement_mw" INTEGER /* Capacity retired in MW */,
  "reason_for_retirement" TEXT /* Reason for retirement (e.g., maintenance, age) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_retirements_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_retirements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for capacity retirement planning */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the forecast is made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_planners" (
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy planner */,
  "planner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the energy planner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the energy planner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the planner belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the planner (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the planner who created the scenario */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the scenario was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES energy_planners ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the retirement */,
  "retirement_mw" INTEGER /* Capacity retired in MW */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_details_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_details_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the planner who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES energy_planners ("planner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy planner accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("planner_id") REFERENCES energy_planners ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_planners" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy planner */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "role_in_department" TEXT /* Role of the planner in the department (e.g., team lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_planners_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_planners_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("planner_id") REFERENCES energy_planners ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "energy_demand" INTEGER /* Energy demand in the forecast year */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in the total energy mix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projection */,
  "co2_emissions" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions in the projection year */,
  "other_emissions" INTEGER /* Other emissions (e.g., NOx, SOx) in the projection year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_projections_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)
